creator: stacey@vickiandstacey.com
text:
After today's cvsup of ports tree, running "pkg_version -v | grep -i "<"" returns multiple errors as
above. Here is a snapshot of what I get:

# pkg_version -v | grep -i "<"

Hitting CTRL C kills it, but I'm not able to run any portupgrade tools cmds, not am I able to even run
"make maintainer" in any port's dir in /usr/ports..,

Fix: 

Don't know.
How-To-Repeat: Cvsup ports tree to latest today
